Class Laptop

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.entity.Laptop
public class Laptop extends Object
Represents a laptop product entity with detailed specifications, pricing, and metadata.
Author:
Sugam Rana Magar

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Laptop()
    Default constructor that creates an empty Laptop instance.
    Laptop(int laptopID, String laptopUUID, String brand, String model, String title, String description, String imgUrl, String img1Url, String img2Url, String thumbnailUrl, String category, String processor, String ram, String storage, String storageType, String graphicsCard, String screenSize, String resolution, String operatingSystem, BigDecimal price, Integer discount, Integer stockQuantity, String availabilityStatus, Integer weight, String color, Integer batteryLife, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime updatedAt)
    Constructs a complete Laptop instance with all fields including database identifiers and metadata.
    Laptop(String laptopUUID, String brand, String model, String title, String description, String processor, String ram, String storage, String storageType, String graphicsCard, String screenSize, String resolution, String operatingSystem, BigDecimal price, Integer discount, Integer stockQuantity, Integer weight, String color, Integer batteryLife, String category)
    Constructs a Laptop instance with essential product and specification details.

  • Constructor Details

    • Laptop

      public Laptop()
      Default constructor that creates an empty Laptop instance.

    • Laptop

      public Laptop(String laptopUUID, String brand, String model, String title, String description, String processor, String ram, String storage, String storageType, String graphicsCard, String screenSize, String resolution, String operatingSystem, BigDecimal price, Integer discount, Integer stockQuantity, Integer weight, String color, Integer batteryLife, String category)
      Constructs a Laptop instance with essential product and specification details. Used for creating new laptop records without database-assigned values.
      Parameters:
      laptopUUID - unique identifier for the laptop
      brand - laptop manufacturer
      model - product model name
      title - product title
      description - detailed product description
      processor - CPU specifications
      ram - memory size
      storage - storage capacity
      storageType - storage medium (SSD or HDD)
      graphicsCard - GPU specifications
      screenSize - display size
      resolution - screen resolution
      operatingSystem - operating system
      price - product price
      discount - discount percentage (nullable)
      stockQuantity - available quantity (nullable)
      weight - device weight in grams (nullable)
      color - product color
      batteryLife - battery life in hours (nullable)
      category - product category

    • Laptop

      public Laptop(int laptopID, String laptopUUID, String brand, String model, String title, String description, String imgUrl, String img1Url, String img2Url, String thumbnailUrl, String category, String processor, String ram, String storage, String storageType, String graphicsCard, String screenSize, String resolution, String operatingSystem, BigDecimal price, Integer discount, Integer stockQuantity, String availabilityStatus, Integer weight, String color, Integer batteryLife, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime updatedAt)
      Constructs a complete Laptop instance with all fields including database identifiers and metadata. Used for retrieving and initializing laptop records from the database.
      Parameters:
      laptopID - database primary key
      laptopUUID - unique identifier for the laptop
      brand - laptop manufacturer
      model - product model name
      title - product title
      description - detailed product description
      imgUrl - primary product image URL
      img1Url - secondary image URL
      img2Url - tertiary image URL
      thumbnailUrl - thumbnail image URL
      category - product category
      processor - CPU specifications
      ram - memory size
      storage - storage capacity
      storageType - storage medium (SSD or HDD)
      graphicsCard - GPU specifications
      screenSize - display size
      resolution - screen resolution
      operatingSystem - operating system
      price - product price
      discount - discount percentage (nullable)
      stockQuantity - available quantity (nullable)
      availabilityStatus - stock availability status
      weight - device weight in grams (nullable)
      color - product color
      batteryLife - battery life in hours (nullable)
      createdAt - record creation timestamp
      updatedAt - record last update timestamp
